insights.title: Files loaded from the Audio Files folder (filesystem path) will not embed in compiled plugins
insights.summary: When loading audio files into a `core.file_player` slot, files must be loaded from the pool using `Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool()` and referenced with the `{PROJECT_FOLDER}` wildcard. Loading via a raw filesystem path works in HISE development but the file will not be found in the compiled plugin because external paths are not embedded.
insights.verify_hint: Confirm that Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool() + {PROJECT_FOLDER} reference is the correct pattern for embedded audio.

insights.title: core.file_player is a low-level, 'raw' node — inconsistent behaviour across DAWs
insights.summary: The `core.file_player` node was originally implemented as an internal test/signal tool and is not production-hardened. Inconsistent looping behaviour was reported across different DAWs (Cubase, Pro Tools, Reaper) due to voice-start timing and sample-rate detection issues. Christoph acknowledged it is 'pretty raw in its current state' and may not be suitable as the sole audio-file playback mechanism in a polished plugin.
insights.verify_hint: Check current HISE source to assess whether the reported DAW inconsistencies have been addressed.

insights.title: Access multiple file_player slots via ScriptFX getAudioFile(index)
insights.summary: To load files into multiple `core.file_player` nodes (each with its own external audio slot) from HiseScript, get a reference to the ScriptFX module and call `getAudioFile(index)` for each slot index. Create all references in `onInit`, not inside control callbacks. Each returned slot object supports `setFile(path)` for runtime file loading.
insights.verify_hint: Confirm ScriptFX.getAudioFile(index) API and that slot indices are zero-based in the order they were created.
